meta.title: Color
meta.description: Brand, text, background, and border color tokens — the system's color foundation.

hero.title: Colors
hero.descLine1: Color carries brand recognition, information hierarchy, and state — all at once.
hero.descLine2: Color in the design system sets the baseline for a consistent product experience. Every UI surface applies the defined tokens; ad-hoc color is avoided.

guidelines.title: Color Usage Guidelines
items: Reference colors by token name, not by hex.
Each color exposes 10 steps (50–900) per WCAG 2.0; the primary step is 500.
Apply defined tokens first across every surface. Avoid arbitrary colors to preserve accessibility and visual consistency.
Text and background must meet readable contrast. If a new color is required, extend through the existing system first; add new colors only when extension isn't viable.

brandColors.title: Brand Colors
brandColors.descLine1: Brand Colors carry brand identity most directly across the product.
brandColors.descLine2: Primary Green is the signature color — apply it to primary actions, active states, and points of emphasis that should align the user's attention with the brand.
brandColors.noteLine1: Primary Green isn't an accent; it's the visual anchor for the product.
brandColors.noteLine2: Apply it consistently against the defined tokens and rules — reinforcing brand recognition and information hierarchy together.

greenVariation.title: Main Green Colour Variation
greenVariation.desc: The Green Scale extends from Primary Green into a graded set. Use it consistently across backgrounds, text, and state representation, scaled to the level of emphasis and context.

textColor.title: Text Colour
textColor.desc: Hierarchy steps through CTA, Primary, Secondary, and Tertiary text colors. Beyond these, other tokens may apply per screen composition.

rows.name: Gray 700
rows.usage: Titles (Title, Subtitle, Body), tabs, filters, OSD viewer, and body text

rows.name: Gray 900
rows.usage: Headings, titles, icon labels, button info, and emphasized text

backgroundDepth.title: Background Depth
backgroundDepth.desc: Use background depth for backgrounds and outlines only — not for text.

rows.name: BG Color / 00dp
rows.usage: Default background; separator for list-like compositions

selectedColor.title: Selected Color
selectedColor.desc: Color tokens for component Selected states.

rows.name: (Table) Selected Hover Color / 02dp
rows.usage: Hover over a selected table row

rows.name: Selected Hover Color / −03dp
rows.usage: Hover over a selected element (e.g. Dropdown item)

borderColor.title: Border Colour
borderColor.desc: Border tokens delineate regions. They aren't applied to backgrounds or text.

rows.name: Gray 200
rows.usage: Default or Hover border on interactive components

secondaryExtra.title: Secondary & Extra Colours
secondaryExtra.desc: Used in Chip, Badge, and Avatar colors — and across state colors. Categorized to cover a range of primary uses.
